items.title: Summon your Notre Dame hate for the schools turning down the NIT
items.summary: When the Notre Dame Football program decided to opt out of the bowl game after being screwed by the college football playoff committee, the columns and podcasts by Notre Dame haters went LUDICROUS SPEED and condemned the decision. There was a large contingent of media members that decided to ignore the reasons why the Irish […]

items.title: Details for Lou Holtz’s funeral at Notre Dame
items.summary: The University of Notre Dame released details of Lou Holtz’s public funural to be held inside the Basilica of the Sacred Heart. There was a public visitation for the legendary Irish football coach on Sunday from 7:00-10:00. The University is sharing opportunities for the extended Notre Dame family, including the campus community, to pay their […]

items.title: “Leave no Doubt” is more than a war cry for Marcus Freeman and Notre Dame Football
items.summary: We’ve heard the phrase, “leave no doubt,” before when it comes to Notre Dame football. Hell — we’ve SEEN it on the field as well. As we approach the start of spring football for the Fighting Irish, the whole mantra is about to be a way of life. In 2024, when the Irish had no […]

items.title: Notre Dame football fans are split on a pre-NIL and a post-NIL world
items.summary: The Notre Dame and college football off-season used to be a lot different, but that was a long time ago. Once conference expansion mania started in 2010, the off-season has been one big clusterbomb of strangeness. It started with conference expansion, then it moved to a college football playoff, then the NIL and transfer portal […]
